  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:6:14
   |
 6 |     optional group Foo = 1 {
   |              ^^^^^
   = note: group syntax is not available in proto3 or editions

  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:11:14
   |
11 |     optional group Bar = 2 {
   |              ^^^^^
   = note: group syntax is not available in proto3 or editions

  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:15:14
   |
15 |     repeated group X = 3 [bar = 1] {
   |              ^^^^^
   = note: group syntax is not available in proto3 or editions

warning: required fields are deprecated
  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:19:5
   |
19 |     required group lowercase = 4 {}
   |     ^^^^^^^^
   = help: do not attempt to change this to `optional` if the field is already
           in-use; doing so is a wire protocol break

warning: group syntax is deprecated
  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:19:14
   |
19 |     required group lowercase = 4 {}
   |              ^^^^^
   = note: group syntax is not available in proto3 or editions

error: group names must start with an uppercase letter
  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:19:20
   |
19 |     required group lowercase = 4 {}
   |                    ^^^^^^^^^

warning: group syntax is deprecated
  --> testdata/parser/field/group.proto:22:9
   |
22 |         group Baz = 5 {}
   |         ^^^^^
   = note: group syntax is not available in proto3 or editions

encountered 1 error and 6 warnings
